# Changelog v0.1.0

Release Date: 2026-05-27

## ✨ Features

- Scaffold @qvac/ai-sdk-provider package. (see PR [#2234](https://github.com/tetherto/qvac/pull/2234))
- Add @qvac/ai-sdk-provider model registry codegen tooling. (see PR [#2235](https://github.com/tetherto/qvac/pull/2235))

## 🧹 Chores

- Add @qvac/ai-sdk-provider logo SVG (currentColor). (see PR [#2266](https://github.com/tetherto/qvac/pull/2266))

## 📦 Models

- Model registry constants initialized: 0 → 729 (+729). See [model changes](./models.md) for the full list.
